title: Royal Doulton Highgate Crystal Glass Flower Vase, Diamond Pattern, 25 cm Tall
features: CRYSTAL DESIGN: Exquisite crystal vase featuring intricate diamond and fan patterns, perfect for displaying floral arrangements
DIMENSIONS: Measures approximately 25 cm in height with a classic tapered silhouette that enhances any room's décor
CRAFTSMANSHIP: Geometric patterns create stunning light refraction and brilliance from every angle
VERSATILITY: Ideal for both formal occasions and everyday use, suitable for long-stemmed flowers or decorative arrangements
CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Hand wash recommended with warm water and mild soap to maintain the crystal's clarity and sparkle
description: Elevate your floral arrangements and home décor with this exquisite Royal Doulton Highgate crystal vase featuring a stunning diamond and fan-cut pattern. The masterfully crafted design showcases intricate geometric details, creating a mesmerising play of light that adds sophistication to any setting. Standing elegantly tall, this premium crystal vase boasts exceptional clarity and brilliance, making it perfect for both special occasions and everyday display. The classic crosshatch pattern combined with dramatic fan motifs reflects timeless craftsmanship, whilst the heavy base ensures stability. Whether displaying fresh blooms or standing alone as a decorative piece, this vase makes a striking statement in any room. The deep cuts in the crystal create beautiful refractions, especially when caught in natural light. Perfect for long-stemmed flowers, this vase combines practicality with luxurious aesthetics. Hand washing is recommended to maintain its sparkling appearance.
